# services.osquery

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.osquery`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.osquery.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable osqueryd daemon. |
| `services.osquery.flags` | `open submodule of attribute set of string` | Attribute set of flag names and values to be written to the osqueryd flagfile. For more information, refer to <https://osquery.readthedocs.io/en/stable/installation/cli-flags>. |
| `services.osquery.flags.database_path` | `absolute path` | Path used for the database file. ::: {.note} If left as the default value, this directory will be automatically created before the service starts, otherwise you are responsible for ensuring the directory exists with the appropriate ownership and permissions. |
| `services.osquery.flags.logger_path` | `absolute path` | Base directory used for logging. ::: {.note} If left as the default value, this directory will be automatically created before the service starts, otherwise you are responsible for ensuring the directory exists with the appropriate ownership and permissions. |
| `services.osquery.flags.pidfile` | `absolute path` | Path used for pid file. |
| `services.osquery.package` | `package` | The osquery package to use. |
| `services.osquery.settings` | `attribute set` | Configuration to be written to the osqueryd JSON configuration file. To understand the configuration format, refer to <https://osquery.readthedocs.io/en/stable/deployment/configuration/#configuration-components>. |
